除了雙女主人設很好，
也很喜歡姊姊的反派人格設定呢！大推"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766370437,"group_id":"7533417513896381465","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"🦉 𝓣𝓦   ❤️‍🔥 𝓛𝓮𝓼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+dGu7UPr6iZCh3FMU3YmOICd3mmzLVD2O1qb+1e4TeF","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/30392206df0544fdb570df7758276a07~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877765&x-signature=fg%2FP%2F4CAV%2FEQBNmQ%2BYl4Yf%2B4B7M%3D","user_id":"1546345790843577","user_name":"ゞ𝓜𝓞𝓜𝓞❦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1546345790843577","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7533417513896381465","book_info":{"abstract":"【双女主+甜文+攻略+微强制！】
【微病娇黏人女配X清冷孤傲撩人女主】
姜昭愿猝死穿书了，不仅穿成了恶毒女配，还绑定了攻略系统。
原主是欺辱女主反派，后期被女主做成了人彘。
姜昭愿：那种事情不要啊！！！
结果穿书就见到被原主关在地下室，还没来得及毁容的女主。
姜昭愿：更想死了呢。
于是，为了避免原主的凄惨结局。
姜昭愿开始对女主嘘寒问暖，还要维持原主的人设，高高在上的给予施舍。
——
魏殊意起先以为自己讨厌那位性格恶毒顽劣的富家千金。
初次见面，对方将自己绑至地牢。
明明刀子都要怼到她脸上了，可却忽然翻脸。
姜昭愿她要做她的情人。
魏殊意为了能够从欺辱忽略自己的家人手中夺权，低头同意，本以为尊严会低到尘埃里。
却没想姜昭愿对待自己不但不恶劣，反而如同高傲的猫猫一样求拥抱。
魏殊意：（心软了一点点）（我才没有喜欢恶毒女人）（彻底心动）
但有一天，姜昭愿却被家人要求离开自己。
魏殊意：“对不起了，我的挚爱，如果你要离开我，那我只能关着你。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/248ba3f204488f999838618254730429","author":"狼夕","author_id":"","book_id":"7533417513896381465","book_name":"撩懵女主后，恶女被关起来了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7533417588374635033","read_count":"14137","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"461283"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"218","tags":"双女主,甜宠,病娇,穿书,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3466e5f6239df65c62b06d5d3fa0774c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779503905&x-signature=tC0mJaW8IR2i1nc7Jpa8HLgXQFc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98135676129","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"340"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324103825D2926095647776D9D9F3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"li
